name: @hyperprior/pi-python
description: Run Python commands from within pi
readme:
# @hyperprior/pi-python

Run python code/files via `hyperpi_python` and `/hyper-python`.

## Installation\n
```bash
pi install npm:@hyperprior/pi-python
```

## Notes

All plugins in this monorepo are namespaced under `@hyperprior` and built to be loaded as individual pi packages.
